_comment_schwab: Schwab replaces Finnhub. Get credentials at https://developer.schwab.com
api_key     = App Key (also called Consumer Key) from your approved app
app_secret  = App Secret from your approved app
callback_url= Must match EXACTLY what you registered (including trailing slash)
token_path  = Where the OAuth token JSON file is stored (auto-created on first run)
First run opens a browser for OAuth; token is saved for future runs.
Token refreshes automatically; re-auth required every 7 days of inactivity.
For headless/server use: set env var SCHWAB_HEADLESS=1 before running.
